neighbors.name: Robert H. Bangle & Pamela J. Bangle
neighbors.claims: Robert H. Bangle has been documented as a resident of Whetstone, Cochise County ([Curling Basics Guestbook](https://www.curlingbasics.com/download/gaestebuch_alt.pdf)). No references to the Bangle family appear in local news or county meeting archives through 2025, indicating they have not taken public positions on development issues.

approach_recommendations.engage: Engage the Bangles with informal, face-to-face outreach emphasizing respect for farmland and how project plans protect their agricultural interests.

neighbors.verification_notes: Confirmed Robert H. Bangle's presence in Whetstone via 2010 guestbook entry. Unable to verify specific property ownership link to PIN 106-06-013Z with available open-source data.

citations.claim: Robert H. Bangle has been documented as a resident of Whetstone, Cochise County
citations.title: Curling Basics Guestbook

neighbors.name: Anton Tyler & Susan Tyler
neighbors.claims: Public records indicate an Anton Tyler, formerly of Grand Rapids, MI, died in Mesa, AZ in 2005 ([MLive Obituary](https://obits.mlive.com/us/obituaries/grandrapids/name/anton-tyler-obituary?id=14280604)). Other records list an Anton Tyler in North Las Vegas ([NM Campaign Finance](https://www.cfis.state.nm.us/docs/FPReports/0_56334_2018_9_10_161340.pdf)). No current evidence of an Anton Tyler residing in Cochise County was found.

approach_recommendations.engage: Verify current ownership and residency status before outreach, as records suggest the listed individual may be deceased or absentee.

neighbors.verification_notes: Found obituary for Anton Tyler (2005) in Mesa, AZ. Found Anton Tyler in Las Vegas. No Cochise County specific records found. Susan Tyler matches found for WA State President (unlikely match).

citations.claim: Public records indicate an Anton Tyler, formerly of Grand Rapids, MI, died in Mesa, AZ in 2005
citations.title: MLive Obituary

citations.claim: Other records list an Anton Tyler in North Las Vegas
citations.title: NM Campaign Finance Report

neighbors.name: James P. Douglass
neighbors.claims: James P. Douglass is a trustee of the James P. Douglass and Jennifer Douglass Family Revocable Trust, based in Sierra Vista ([Sierra Vista Herald](https://spv.stparchive.com/Archive/SPV/SPV12082021P029.php)). The Trust is associated with vacant land in Huachuca City ([Sierra Vista Herald](https://spv.stparchive.com/Archive/SPV/SPV12082021P029.php)). Douglass has been listed in professional contractor records ([AnyFlip](https://anyflip.com/ummia/iuhq/basic)).

approach_recommendations.engage: Highlight local job creation and contracting opportunities when meeting with Douglass, as his background in construction suggests he may respond positively to fair local hiring and business involvement.

neighbors.verification_notes: Confirmed Trust existence and Sierra Vista address via public notice. Confirmed contractor listing. Removed specific financial details regarding property status.

citations.claim: James P. Douglass is a trustee of the James P. Douglass and Jennifer Douglass Family Revocable Trust, based in Sierra Vista
citations.title: Sierra Vista Herald Public Notice

citations.claim: The Trust is associated with vacant land in Huachuca City
citations.title: Sierra Vista Herald Public Notice

citations.claim: Douglass has been listed in professional contractor records
citations.title: AnyFlip Document

neighbors.name: Virginia Fleming
neighbors.claims: Virginia Fleming was a resident of Huachuca City ([SimpleContacts](https://www.simplecontacts.com/profile/Joseph-Meyer-14145561)). Records indicate she died in November 2022 ([Webb Mortuary](https://www.webbmortuary.com/obituaries/virginia-fleming)). The property associated with her name was sold in September 2022 ([Redfin](https://www.redfin.com/AZ/Huachuca-City/2059-W-Cougar-Pl-85616/home/115029799)).

approach_recommendations.engage: Identify current property owners as Virginia Fleming is deceased. Approach new owners with general introduction.

neighbors.verification_notes: Subject appears to be deceased (2022) and property sold. Profile updated to reflect historical status.

citations.claim: Virginia Fleming was a resident of Huachuca City
citations.title: SimpleContacts Profile

citations.claim: Records indicate she died in November 2022
citations.title: Webb Mortuary Obituary

citations.claim: The property associated with her name was sold in September 2022
citations.title: Redfin Property History
